en: Right? Maybe. Mr. Hopkins, you may agree with him, thinking,
yes, we should simply study our Mr. Pritchard and learn our rhyme and meter and go quietly about the business
of achieving other ambitions. I have a little secret for you. Huddle up.
We don't read and write poetry because it's cute.
ko: 우리는 시를 읽고 쓰는 것이 귀여워서가 아닙니다.

en: We read and write poetry because we are members of the human race,
ko: 우리는 인류의 일원으로서 시를 읽고 쓰는 것입니다.

en: and the human race is filled with passion.
Medicine, law, business, engineering, these are noble pursuits and necessary to sustain life.
these are what we stay alive for.
Oh, me, oh, life of the questions of these recurring,
ko: 오 나여, 오 삶이여, 이 질문들의 질문들.
